title: taraxacum obliquum
intro: Taraxacum obliquum, also known as the lesser dandelion or slippery dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce pain and swelling, and protect against cell damage. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as improving digestion, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum obliquum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
